One sentence is enough — type of work, who you serve, where you operate. Set up your public page, booking, and the tools to take jobs.

Built for service businesses

Trades that look sharp online

From detailing to photography, every trade gets a Blueprint — booking-ready presence without an agency price tag.

Auto detailing
Window cleaning
House cleaning
HVAC
Lawn care
Spa & wellness
Pressure washing
Photography
Everything to run and grow

Not just a website

Your public page is one piece. Booking, jobs, customers, and chat are built to run the business after launch.

Pg

Public page

A Blueprint-correct first draft — services, photos, and copy that match your trade.

Bk

Smart booking

Customers pick a service, day, and time on their phone so they can book while you’re on a job.

Ch

Chat on site

Answers common questions and captures leads while you’re busy.

Sc

Jobs & calendar

See today’s work, keep customer details tidy, and manage bookings from one dashboard.

Cu

Customers

Contacts, history, and follow-ups in one place — including recurring plans when you need them.

Rv

Reviews & growth

Collect proof, show it on the page, and keep improving after launch with Hubly Coach.

How it works

From prompt to live

Describe the business. Get set up. Share the link.

01

Describe

Your work in your words. Hubly picks the right Blueprint.

02

Get set up

Storefront, services, and booking appear as a first draft you can polish.

03

Go live

Share your Hubly link and manage jobs from the dashboard.

Talk with us

Questions, pricing, or a live walkthrough

Settings
AIHubly AI▼

Ask in plain English, drag the preview, or drop a screenshot of a site you like and Claude will restyle yours toward that vibe.

Drop a screenshot here or tap to upload · paste (⌘V / Ctrl+V) also works
Inspiration locked in Ask AI to match this look, or clear it.
1Choose website style▼
Pick a complete website design. Your content stays the same. only the look changes.
1bLogo & photos▼
Upload your logo and portfolio shots. Hubly places the logo in the header and your photos in the gallery / first screen.
🏷️

Upload your logo

🖼️

Upload hero / banner photo

2Hero▼
2bPromo bar (website)▼
Shows the Featured promo from Account → Promo codes. Manage all codes under Account.
3Packages▼
4Gallery▼
Dump your best photos here — they show on the website gallery (and replace stock images).
5Reviews▼
Set your star rating and add real reviews. Copy text from Google or type them in.
6Meet the owner▼
👤

Click to upload owner photo

7FAQ▼
Questions & answers on your website. SEO fields are auto-generated when you publish.
8Membership▼
Offer one or more recurring memberships. Signups land in Needs Review. accept to create a recurring customer.
9Business & hours▼
Separate with commas, or refine on the map below.
Refine on map Pick states & cities you cover. The map updates with your home base and a drive-radius.
25 mi

Add a home-base city to plot the map.

Business hours
Shown on your website so clients know when you're available
10Social links▼
Shows as clickable icons in your website footer. Updates live in the preview.
Have a Google Business Profile? Add it here. No profile yet? Leave blank and we'll collect reviews for you.
A1Payment & deposits▼
Account-wide rules for every booking. Individual services can still override payment.
Default payment
💳 Full payment now
Client pays the full amount at booking
💵 Deposit to hold
Client pays deposit now, rest on the day
Deposit amount
%
🤝 Pay in person only
Client pays on the day
🔀 Client's choice
Pay now or pay in person
A2Dirty vehicle surcharges▼
When enabled, customers pick a dirtiness level during booking and the surcharge is added to the total.
Charge extra for dirty vehicles on the booking flow
A3Promo codes▼
Create codes you can give out (texts, flyers, first-time offers). Mark one as Featured for the website promo bar. One-time codes can only be used once per phone or email.
11Booking▼
How the booking page looks. Payment and dirty surcharges live under Account.
Booking page style
Add-on extras
Booking flow options
Show add-on extras
Show vehicle condition selector
Allow photo upload by client
12Your URL▼
🔗.hubly.app
